name: Turkey Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and mash potatoes, or use leftovers. Stir in egg.
2. Spread mixture in a well-oiled 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 minutes.
4. Combine mayonnaise and lemon juice; stir in turkey, celery, and peas.
5. Spoon filling into potato crust.
6. Top with cheese.
7. Continue baking for 15-20 minutes or until hot through.
